title: Home
meta_description: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT or NIT Allahabad), formerly Motilal Nehru Regional Engineering College (MNREC), is a public higher education institute located in Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India.
meta_keywords: MNNIT Allahabad, NIT Allahabad, Allahabad, NIT, MNNIT
